data.title: Litecoin, Dogecoin Record Hash Rate Gains After A Mining Company Reveals 3X Profit Over Bitcoin
data.description: Litecoin (CRYPTO: LTC) and Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) recorded a sharp uptick in hash rate on Sunday after a mining company disclosed that the two coins yielded three times the profit as mining Bitcoin (CRYPTO: <

data.title: Elon Musk's SpaceX Gets Pentagon Contract To Extend Ukraine's Access To Starshield: Report
data.description: Elon Musk's rocket manufacturing company SpaceX has reportedly bagged a Pentagon contract to expand Ukraine's access to Starshield.

data.title: How To Use Apple Watch As A Digital Key For Your Tesla Car
data.description: Tesla has launched an official Apple Watch app, enabling users to use their watch as a digital key for unlocking, locking, and controlling various vehicle functions, enhancing convenience and eliminating the need for third-party apps.

data.title: Apple Expands Retail Footprint In Saudi Arabia With Online Store Launch, Plans Multiple Flagship Locations
data.description: Apple announced ambitious expansion plans in Saudi Arabia, marking a significant step in its Middle East growth strategy. The tech giant will launch its first Arabic-language online store in the summer of 2025, followed by multiple flagship retail locations starting in 2026, according to a company announcement Sunday.
